title: Result - Finland
content:
Welcome to Finland, a Nordic wonderland in Northern Europe spanning 338,145 square kilometres.
Experience a blend of cozy small towns, vibrant cities and pristine nature, including around 188,000 lakes. In the north, witness the magical northern lights in winter and the midnight sun in summer. Christmas enthusiasts can explore Lapland, home to Santa Claus according to Finnish tradition, with Korvatunturi mountain as his mythical residence.

## Unique food tradition
Korvapuusti (cinnamon rolls): translated to slapped ears, sweet enriched dough scented with cardamom, filled with buttery cinnamon sugar, rolled up like cinnamon rolls, cut into triangle shapes.
Finland emphasizes work-life balance, providing an employee-friendly workday. Finland also has a vibrant start-up scene and rapidly growing tech sector, offering exciting opportunities for English-speaking professionals from around the world.

### Local legend or myth
Väinämöinen: a deity from ancient times, before the world's creation (in which he played a role), who was a master of magic songs and spells.

### Language of the Land
Finnish is pronounced as it is written, with almost a 100% correspondence between letters and sounds.
kilograms per year -- Finns lead the world in coffee consumption.
